name: Old Fashioned Sugar Cookies-TVFN
recipeIngredient: Coarse sugar for decorating (colored or plain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg, then blend in cream and extract.
4. Gradually mix in dry ingredients until well combined.
5. Shape the dough into a flattened ball and wrap in parchment.
6. Chill for at least 1/2 hour.
7. Roll out on lightly floured surface until about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
9. Sprinkle sugar over cookies and place them on parchment-covered baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake until golden brown. Yield: 4 dozen Sugar Cookies.
